case_title: OTTO HUI VS. KARIM RODERICK GOMEZ et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO MARIA RIVERA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-09-2011 AT 8:30AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUI, OTTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, KARIM RODERICK $1,883.18 PRINCIPAL, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,313.18, PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS DISMISSAL OF HIS CLAIM AGAINST JORGE GONZALES GRANTED. CLAIM AGAINST JORGE GONZALES IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CLAIM AGAINST MARIA RIVERA IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE ( NO PROOF OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $150.00) SERVED JUL-13-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, KARIM RODERICK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2011 - JUDGMENT.
CORRESPONDENCE RETURNED - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,883.18 FILED BY HUI, OTTO AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, KARIM RODERICK GONZALES, JORGE RIVERA, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $230.00) SERVED JUL-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, JORGE
